langNotice: This document is provided in Korean. The Korean version is the official text and prevails for all legal purposes.
refundAlert:
[BaroSit Subscription Refund Policy Summary]

1. Cooling-off withdrawal (within 7 days of payment)
 - Full 100% refund if the service has not been used.

2. Mid-term refund (when the above does not apply)
 - Annual plan: The amount for days used is deducted, and a penalty (up to 10% of the remaining balance) is deducted from that balance; the rest is refunded.
   The annual discount is retroactively forfeited, and days used are pro-rated at the regular monthly price.
 - Monthly plan: No mid-term refund. You may cancel and continue using the service until the paid period ends.

3. Cancellation
 - Available any time before the next billing date. Your plan reverts to FREE at period end with no further charge.

4. Requests and inquiries
 - Profile menu [Manage subscription -> Request refund] (estimated refund shown before you confirm)
 - Or email support@barosit.com
